title: draba alpina var. macrocarpa
intro: Draba alpina var. macrocarpa, also known as alpine whitlowgrass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba alpina var. macrocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin conditions, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
